scripts.build: pnpm --filter @proliferate/cloud-sdk build && pnpm --filter @proliferate/cloud-sdk-react build && pnpm --filter @proliferate/product-domain build && pnpm --filter @proliferate/ui build && pnpm --filter @proliferate/product-ui build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @proliferate/cloud-sdk build && pnpm --filter @proliferate/cloud-sdk-react build && pnpm --filter @proliferate/product-domain build && pnpm --filter @proliferate/ui build && pnpm --filter @proliferate/product-ui build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @proliferate/cloud-sdk build && pnpm --filter @proliferate/cloud-sdk-react build && pnpm --filter @proliferate/product-domain build && pnpm --filter @proliferate/ui build && pnpm --filter @proliferate/product-ui build && vitest run
